TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Abdelaziz_Bouteflika, title = Abdelaziz_Bouteflika, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Abdelaziz_Bouteflika} }

S.FORM: I 1937 a miheca saka 3 folad saka 2 a romi'ad masofoc ci Abdelaziz Bouteflika , malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Algeria anini i ci Abdelaziz Bouteflika, patirengan a romi'ad i 1999 a miheca saka 4 folad saka 27 a romi'ad.
S.PHON: i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka * a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ maso~ufo~u ¶ ¶i ab~b~v…¨~…ģ…ô…ĺa*i* b~b~vo~uo~u~ut…ôf…ĺika , ma…ĺamiko~umo~u…¨~…ģaj a tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit no~u a…ĺ*…ôria anini i ¶i ab~b~v…¨~…ģ…ô…ĺa*i* b~b~vo~uo~u~ut…ôf…ĺika, patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ.
S.FORM: I 1937 a miheca saka 3 folad saka 2 a romi'ad masofoc ci Abdelaziz Bouteflika , malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Algeria anini i ci Abdelaziz Bouteflika, patirengan a romi'ad i 1999 a miheca saka 4 folad saka 27 a romi'ad.
S.PHON: i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka * a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ maso~ufo~u ¶ ¶i ab~b~v…¨~…ģ…ô…ĺa*i* b~b~vo~uo~u~ut…ôf…ĺika , ma…ĺamiko~umo~u…¨~…ģaj a tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit no~u a…ĺ*…ôria anini i ¶i ab~b~v…¨~…ģ…ô…ĺa*i* b~b~vo~uo~u~ut…ôf…ĺika, patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ.
